nodes.name: Append Pain + Outcome to Notion Page

parameters.name: content
parameters.value:
={{ '🆕 **New intake: ' + $('Normalize + Tag').item.json.company_name + '**
' + '> Pain: ' + $('Normalize + Tag').item.json.pain_primary + '
' + '> Team: ' + $('Normalize + Tag').item.json.team_size + '  |  Cloud: ' + $('Normalize + Tag').item.json.cloud + '
' + '> Tags: `' + $('Normalize + Tag').item.json.tags_str + '`
' + '> Contact: ' + $('Normalize + Tag').item.json.contact_name + ' <' + $('Normalize + Tag').item.json.contact_email + '>
' + '> Notion: ' + $('Create Notion Client Record').item.json.url }}

parameters.responseBody: ={ "ok": true, "message": "Intake received. We'll be in touch within 1 business day." }

main.node: Append Pain + Outcome to Notion Page

meta.description: Processes client intake form submissions. Normalizes + tags, creates Notion record, appends pain/outcome as page body, fires Discord alert.
env_required: NOTION_CLIENTS_DB_ID   — Notion database ID for client records
DISCORD_INTAKE_WEBHOOK_URL — Discord channel webhook for internal alerts
